name: create-accessible-astro-starter
description: Create a new Accessible Astro Starter project with guided presets.

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:test && node --test dist-test/test/scaffold.test.js dist-test/test/cli-output.test.js
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run build:test && node dist-test/test/e2e.js
